examples: Monosyllabic adverbs in modern Chinese can be reduplicated.
Forget media-fueled images of monosyllabic grunters and strong, silent types.
I'd say "infant" but infants are pre-verbal, and he has a few words, most of them monosyllabic.
Before the scandal broke, Woods could be evasive and monosyllabic when facing the media.
As for Karl Urban, he was everything Dredd should be: tough, monosyllabic, inflexible.
